name: fizzy
description: Fizzy workflows for boards, cards, comments, account setup, self-hosted management, and connector-native MCP access.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Fizzy from the CLI or self-hosted MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Fizzy automation for boards, cards, comments, setup, self-hosted workflows, and connector-native MCP access. Prefer the CLI for local shell work and the MCP server for ChatGPT/Codex connector flows.
defaultPrompt: Set up the Fizzy CLI or MCP server for the hosted instance.
List boards and summarize active work in Fizzy.
Manage Fizzy cards and comments from the CLI or MCP.
